# Project: example-app

This is an example project's existing CLAUDE.md. It has custom content that vibe-retrofit must NOT clobber.

## Custom conventions
- Use kebab-case for filenames
- Branches: feature/*, fix/*, chore/*
- Commit format: conventional commits

## Local notes
- Pinned Node version: 20.x via .nvmrc
- Stripe webhook secret rotates monthly — check 1Password
